creator: sv@ulstu.ru
text: Why wasn't this patch added to the virtualbox-ose-5.2.44 port? I had no sound in the FreeBSD 12.1 guest system. When I added this patch and recompiled the port, the sound appeared. My host system FreeBSD 12.1 RELEASE-p7 amd64. I wish this patch was added to the virtualbox-ose-5.2.44 port. This patch is working.
